summary: March 24, 2026 was an inactive trading day. The XRP Market Cipher bot was already in stopped state from hitting its daily loss limit on March 23rd when a SHORT position stopped out. The bot briefly ran for ~1 minute at 03:55 UTC before shutting down. Monitor attempted to restart the bot from 21:55 UTC onward but all attempts failed. No trades were executed. Balance remained at 114.80 XRP with -$26.83 total PnL. Git showed normal 2-hourly backup commits throughout the day. No strategy changes. Health agent ran periodic checks but other agents showed minimal activity. Immediate action: review VPN connectivity and reset bot for next trading session.
